content.problemStatement:
There is a checkered field with 10510^5105 rows (numbered 111 through 10510^5105) and 10510^5105 columns (numbered 111 through 10510^5105). NNN different cells in this field (numbered 111 through NNN) are marked; for each valid iii, the coordinates of the iii-th marked cell are (xi,yi)(x_i, y_i)(xi‚Äč,yi‚Äč).

A set of cells is suitable if it meets the following conditions:


All marked cells belong to this set.
For any two cells aaa and bbb belonging to this set, there is a path between them with length ‚ą£xa‚ąíxb‚ą£+‚ą£ya‚ąíyb‚ą£|x_a - x_b| + |y_a - y_b|‚ą£xa‚Äč‚ąíxb‚Äč‚ą£+‚ą£ya‚Äč‚ąíyb‚Äč‚ą£ which only visits cells in this set. Each pair of consecutive cells in a path must have a common side.
You need to find the smallest possible size of a suitable set of cells, as well as the number of sets with this smallest size. Since the number of sets may be very large, compute it modulo 109+710^9 + 7109+7.
constraints: 1‚Č§xi,yi‚Č§1051 \leq x_i, y_i \leq 10^51‚Č§xi‚Äč,yi‚Äč‚Č§105 for each valid iii
`ExplanationThe two suitable sets with the smallest size 101010 are
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains two space-separated integers NNN and TTT.
NNN lines follow. For each valid iii, the iii-th of these lines contains two space-separated integers xix_ixi‚Äč and yiy_iyi‚Äč.
content.outputFormat:
If T=0T = 0T=0, print a single line containing one integer ‚Äē the smallest size of a suitable set.
If T=1T = 1T=1, print a single line containing two space-separated integers ‚Äē the smallest size of a suitable set and the number of sets with this size modulo 109+710^9+7109+7.
